zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Humphrey Poyntz於1430年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Poyntz50歲，母親Elizabeth Mills30歲。他和Elizabeth Pollard至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1487年10月10日在英國格盧斯特斯爾艾爾可斯同享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Humphrey Poyntz于1430年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas Poyntz50岁，母亲Elizabeth Mills30岁。他和Elizabeth Pollard至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1487年10月10日在英国格盧斯特斯爾艾爾可斯同享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Poyntz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Humphrey Poyntz was born in 1430, in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, was 50 and his mother, Elizabeth Mills, was 30. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Elizabeth Pollard. He died on 10 October 1487, in Elkstone, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Humphrey Poyntz est né en 1430, à Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mills, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Elizabeth Pollard. Il est décédé le 10 octobre 1487, à Elkstone, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Humphrey Poyntz 1430 in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas Poyntz 50 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Mills 30. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Pollard mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Oktober 1487 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Elkstone, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Poyntz è nato il nel 1430 nel Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Mills, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Elizabeth Pollard. Morì il 10 ottobre 1487, nel Elkstone, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Poyntzが1430年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアイロン アクトンで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Poyntzは50歳，母Elizabeth Millsは30歳であった。彼はElizabeth Pollardとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1487年10月10日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアエルクストーンで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Poyntz(이)가 1430년 영국 그루스스터실르 이런 악턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Poyntz(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mills(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Pollard(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 10월 10일 영국 그루스스터실르 엘크스톤에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Poyntz nasceu em 1430, em Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mills, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Elizabeth Pollard. Ele faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1487, em Elkstone, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Humphrey Poyntz родился в 1430 г. в местности ирон актон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Poyntz было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mills, 30. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Elizabeth Pollard. Он умер 10 октября 1487 г. в местности элкстоун, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Humphrey Poyntz nació en 1430, en Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mills, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Elizabeth Pollard. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1487, en Elkstone, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
